meta.title: Relative Clauses
meta.description: Learn to use defining and non-defining relative clauses.
meta.description_ko: 한정 관계절과 비한정 관계절 사용법을 학습합니다.

explanation.en: 'Who' for people, 'which' for things, 'where' for places, 'when' for time.

questions.prompt: 관계 대명사 'who'는 어떤 경우에 쓰나요?

explanation.en: 'Who' as subject of relative clause referring to a person.

questions.prompt: The man _____ called you yesterday is my brother.

explanation.en: Defining: essential info, no commas. Non-defining: extra info, uses commas.
explanation.ko: 한정: 필수 정보, 쉼표 없음. 비한정: 추가 정보, 쉼표 사용.

questions.prompt: 한정 관계절 vs 비한정 관계절의 차이는?
choices: 한정: 쉼표 없이 필수 정보, 비한정: 쉼표로 추가 정보
한정: 쉼표로 구분, 비한정: 쉼표 없이
한정: that 사용 불가, 비한정: that 사용 가능

explanation.en: Defining relative clause with 'that' for a thing.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: The book that I bought is really interesting.

explanation.en: 'Which' is for things. Use 'who'/'that' for people.

questions.prompt: 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'The woman which lives next door is a doctor.'

explanation.en: Non-defining clause about a place (thing): use 'which' with commas.

questions.prompt: Paris, _____ I visited last summer, is a beautiful city.

explanation.en: Relative pronoun can be omitted in defining clauses when it's the object.
explanation.ko: 한정절에서 관계 대명사가 목적어일 때 생략 가능.

questions.prompt: 관계 대명사가 목적어 역할을 할 때 생략 가능한 경우는?

explanation.en: 'Where' for places in relative clauses.

questions.prompt: The city _____ I was born has changed a lot.

explanation.en: 'Whose' = possessive relative pronoun for people and things.
explanation.ko: 'whose' = 사람과 사물 모두에 쓰이는 소유 관계 대명사.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: John, whose car was stolen, filed a report.

explanation.en: 'That' cannot be used in non-defining relative clauses.

questions.prompt: 'That'은 어떤 관계절에서 사용할 수 없나요?

explanation.en: 'When' for times/days in relative clauses.

questions.prompt: I remember the day _____ we first met.

explanation.en: In non-defining clauses, use 'who' for people, not 'that'.

questions.prompt: 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'My sister, that works in Seoul, is visiting this weekend.'

explanation.en: 'Why' for reasons in relative clauses.

questions.prompt: The reason _____ I left was not the salary.

explanation.en: 'The film I watched' — 'that' has been omitted (object of relative clause).
explanation.ko: 'The film I watched' — 목적어 역할의 'that'이 생략됨.

questions.prompt: 관계 대명사가 생략된 문장은?
choices: The man who called is here.
The film that I watched was great.
The film I watched was great.
My brother, who is a doctor, lives in Busan.

explanation.en: Relative pronoun 'whom/that' omitted as object.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: The man I met yesterday is a famous singer.

explanation.en: 'Who' as subject of relative clause referring to a person.

questions.prompt: She's the kind of person _____ always knows what to say.

explanation.en: 'Which' can refer to a whole preceding clause: 'He passed, which surprised everyone.'
explanation.ko: 'which'는 앞 절 전체를 받을 수 있습니다.

questions.prompt: 'which'가 비한정 관계절에서 갖는 특별한 용도는?

explanation.en: 'Whose + noun' shows possession.

questions.prompt: He's a scientist _____ work has changed the world.

explanation.en: When using 'where', don't add 'in it' — 'where' includes the preposition.

questions.prompt: 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'The hotel where we stayed in it was very comfortable.'

explanation.en: Relative clause with passive voice: 'which is spoken by'.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: Korean is a language which is spoken by 80 million people.

explanation.en: 'Where' for a place where something happened.

questions.prompt: That's the restaurant _____ we had our first date.

explanation.en: 'Whom' is the object form of 'who', used in formal English.

questions.prompt: 'whom'은 언제 쓰나요?

explanation.en: 'Which' for a company (thing), used as object of preposition 'for'.

questions.prompt: The company _____ he works for is very successful.

explanation.en: 'A man who can speak six languages' — correct use of 'who' for person.
explanation.ko: 'a man who can speak six languages' — 사람에 'who' 올바른 사용.

questions.prompt: 다음 중 관계절이 올바르게 쓰인 문장은?
choices: The woman that she lives here is my aunt.
I know a man who can speak six languages.
She is the teacher which taught me English.
That is the town where I was born there.

explanation.en: 'Who' as subject of the relative clause referring to 'the man'.

questions.prompt: 빈칸에 알맞은 것은? 'A: Is that the man _____ told you about the job? B: Yes, that's him.'
